arts.ttl: Caoimhin Kelleher tells Liverpool team-mates what they must do next under Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool have kept four clean sheets in five Premier League matches so far this season, with back up stopper Caoimhin Kelleher keeping a clean sheet against Bournemouth in Alisson's absence on Saturday

arts.ttl: Why emotional Darwin Nunez gave Arne Slot what he asked for ahead of Virgil van Dijk advice
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez scored his first goal of the season after being handed a maiden start by Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot 'approved transfer' as FA launch biting investigation
arts.sum: Liverpool's preparations to face West Ham are well underway after Arne Slot led his side to victory over Bournemouth in the Premier League and bounced back from his first defeat as boss

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'want' three Bayer Leverkusen stars as £16m target 'emerges'
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip with three Bayer Leverkusen players reportedly on the Reds' transfer radar while a La Liga defender has also been linked

arts.ttl: I think the ideal time for Federico Chiesa has come - I like what I've seen
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa had an 18 minute cameo against Bournemouth after making his Liverpool debut in Milan

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold comments hint at Liverpool dream that could end contract worry
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Rimmer, Stephen Killen, Keifer MacDonald, Richard Garnett, Tom Coley)
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold was coy on his future at Liverpool after speaking to the media after Saturday's 3-0 win over Everton

arts.ttl: Liverpool star hailed 'best in the world' as three-year Jurgen Klopp claim proved right
arts.sum: Liverpool have enjoyed a bright start to life under Arne Slot and one of Jurgen Klopp’s favourites remains a key member of the Reds squad having been backed as one of the best in the world

arts.ttl: “Absolutely atrocious” | Pundit pulls no punches when asked about West Ham’s performance against Chelsea
arts.sum: A pundit has ripped into West Ham and Julen Lopetegui for their performance in their 3-0 loss to Chelsea. While they’ve not played particularly well in any of their games this season, their performance against Chelsea might just be the worst. They created very few clear cut chances, they got absolutely demolished in midfield, and... arts.sum: A hardly used West Ham star has been told to ‘“toughen up” if he wants to get a chance in the Premier League.
